title: Semiconductor device and forming method thereof
abstract: A method includes forming source/drain regions in a semiconductor substrate; depositing a zirconium-containing oxide layer over a channel region in the semiconductor substrate and between the source/drain region; forming a titanium oxide layer in contact with the zirconium-containing oxide layer; forming a top electrode over the zirconium-containing oxide layer, wherein no annealing is performed after depositing the zirconium-containing oxide layer and prior to forming the top electrode.
claims: 1. A method comprising: forming a zirconium-containing oxide layer over a substrate; inducing a paraelectric-to-ferroelectric phase transition in the zirconium-containing oxide layer by forming a first titanium oxide layer in direct contact with the zirconium-containing oxide layer; and forming a top electrode over the zirconium-containing oxide layer and the first titanium oxide layer, wherein no annealing is performed after forming the zirconium-containing oxide layer and prior to forming the top electrode.
